title: diodia teres subsp. angustata
intro: Diodia teres subsp. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved button quail bush or narrow-leaved button bush, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Diodia teres subsp. angustata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
